title: Everyone Is Special
lesson: Everyone looks different and likes different things, and those differences make us special friends.
prompts: Place the person from the input image into a bright, cheerful classroom with a colourful rug. The person from the input image sits on the far left in a small circle, facing the camera with a friendly smile and the face fully visible. To the right sit {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK}, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_ASIAN} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN}, chatting together. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image sits on the far left, facing the camera with a curious, interested expression and the face fully visible, watching a friend share. To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_ASIAN} holds up a favourite picture book while {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} watches. Cheerful classroom, warm light, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image sits on the far left proudly holding up their own favourite toy, facing the camera with a happy, sharing smile and the face fully visible. To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} clap and look interested. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm classroom light, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A storybook scene where the friends notice how different they all look. The person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with a warm laughing smile and the face fully visible. To the right stand {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK}, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_ASIAN} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN}, each looking different and all smiling. Eye-level medium-wide shot, bright friendly light, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image stands on the far left holding hands in a circle with friends, facing the camera with a joyful smile and the face fully visible. To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK}, {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} and {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_ASIAN} hold hands too, all together. Colourful classroom, warm light, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image stands on the far left in a happy group hug with friends, facing the camera with a big warm smile and the face fully visible. To the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK}, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_ASIAN} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_SOUTH_ASIAN} hug in close, all delighted. Golden classroom light, heart-warming soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
